title: alchemilla xanthochlora
intro: Alchemilla xanthochlora, also known as golden lady's mantle or golden alchemilla, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alchemilla xanthochlora include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes. Alchemilla xanthochlora is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed or applied topically to the skin.
